# Layal Alshaikh Group — Luxury Real Estate & Business Setup in Qatar

> Layal Alshaikh Group is a family-owned luxury real estate advisory and business-setup firm in Doha, Qatar, established in 2004. We help families and investors buy, sell, and rent villas, apartments, and penthouses across Qatar's most prestigious communities — The Pearl, Lusail, West Bay, Msheireb, Fox Hills and Katara Hills — and provide complete company-formation, PRO, visa, legal and tax services. Over 20 years we have helped more than 1,200 families find a home in Qatar.

## Why buy real estate in Qatar
- Foreigners can buy freehold property in designated zones such as The Pearl, Lusail and West Bay Lagoon.
- 0% annual property tax and 0% personal income tax.
- Property ownership above the qualifying threshold can lead to Qatari residency.
- Among the highest rental yields in the GCC (around 7%+), with steady capital growth.

## Services
- Real estate advisory: buying, selling, renting, off-plan and investment — including exclusive off-market listings.
- Company registration: LLC, branch office and sole proprietorship via the Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI).
- PRO & visa services: residency, labour contracts and government clearances.
- Corporate legal structuring, VAT/tax & accounting compliance, and corporate banking assistance.

- [Home](https://www.layalgroup.com/): Overview, signature residences, market insights and how we care for clients.

- [Gallery](https://www.layalgroup.com/gallery.html): Photography and video tours of homes.
- [About](https://www.layalgroup.com/about.html): The family-owned story, the team, and why clients trust us.
- [Contact](https://www.layalgroup.com/contact.html): Speak with a dedicated advisor.

## Communities we serve
The Pearl Qatar, Lusail City (including Fox Hills, Marina District and Katara Hills), West Bay, Msheireb Downtown, and Al Waab.
